CTF History

Battle-Tested

A growing record of competitions that shaped who we are.

2025-2026 Run National + Global

Breakthrough Run — #49 Global

Competed in 70+ events across national and international circuits, accumulating 349.718 rating points and securing our best ranking yet: #49 globally and 3rd in Bangladesh on CTFtime.

70+ CTFs 349.718 pts #49 Global #3 Bangladesh
UMDCTF 2026 University of Maryland

14th Place, Open Division — 49.949 pts

One of our strongest individual performances. Scored 2,193 points at UMDCTF 2026, placing 14th in the Open Division out of 743 teams and earning nearly 50 rating points.

2193 CTF pts 49.949 rating pts Top 15
TAMUctf 2026 Texas A&M University

91st Place — 54.849 pts

Our highest single-event rating point haul in 2026. Solved challenges across multiple categories earning 1,430 CTF points and 54.849 rating points.

1430 CTF pts 54.849 rating pts
BUET CTF 2026 National · Bangladesh

7th Place — National Breakout

Finished 7th at BUET CTF 2026, one of the biggest national CTFs in Bangladesh, marking one of our strongest domestic results.

#7 Finish National CTF
CUET CTF 2025 National · Bangladesh

11th Place — Strong National Showing

Placed 11th in CUET CTF 2025, another major national event, proving the team could compete consistently across Bangladesh's top university CTFs.

#11 Finish National CTF
V1t CTF 2025 Season Highlight

20th Place — Breakout International Push

Secured 20th place at V1t CTF 2025, one of the defining results from our debut year and an early sign that CIA could punch above its age.

#20 Finish 2025 Highlight
2025 Season Global · First Year

Origin — Team Founded at BUP

CIA was born in 2025 from a small group of BUP students. That first season established our national presence with standout finishes at V1t and CUET, setting up the climb that later took us to #3 in Bangladesh.

98.599 pts #645 Global #11 Bangladesh
© 2025–2026 Cyber Invasion Army (CIA) · BUP, Bangladesh
